Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.dbbackuprestore.driver

    • Method Detail

      • backupId

        public Backup.BackupBuilder backupId​(String backupId)
        Unique identifier for the backup. Format and content are provider-specific (e.g., ARN for AWS, snapshot ID for Alibaba).
        Returns:
        this.

      • resourceName

        public Backup.BackupBuilder resourceName​(String resourceName)
        Name of the table that this backup represents.
        Returns:
        this.

        public Backup.BackupBuilder status​(BackupStatus status)
        Current status of the backup.
        Returns:
        this.

      • creationTime

        public Backup.BackupBuilder creationTime​(Instant creationTime)
        Timestamp when the backup was created.
        Returns:
        this.

      • expiryTime

        public Backup.BackupBuilder expiryTime​(Instant expiryTime)
        Timestamp when the backup expires (if applicable). Null if the backup does not have an expiration.
        Returns:
        this.

      • sizeInBytes

        public Backup.BackupBuilder sizeInBytes​(long sizeInBytes)
        Size of the backup in bytes (if available). -1 if size information is not available.
        Returns:
        this.

      • description

        public Backup.BackupBuilder description​(String description)
        Description or human-readable name for the backup.
        Returns:
        this.

      • vaultId

        public Backup.BackupBuilder vaultId​(String vaultId)
        Vault identifier where the backup is stored.
